title: CAU Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for MTS Posts
description: Central Agricultural University (CAU) has declared the official notification for the recruitment of various MTS Jobs. Candidates with B.E/ B.Tech, Post Graduation can grab this chance and apply for the CAU Notification 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can attend the walk-in at the address below. If you are looking for more, here is a list of Gover...
